name: pdesk-bind-save-roundtrip
description: The desktop document-lifecycle contract, end to end on real disk: build a vault via the debug_write_file IPC channel, bind it with __canaryBindVault (no native dialog), verify hash-based pointer Refresh on TauriFsAdapter v2 (capabilities.hash === true — the P2 tripwire), mutate, save via the NATIVE menu path (__canaryEmitMenuEvent('save') — on desktop Ctrl+S is a native accelerator that synthetic DOM events cannot reach; the emit drives the real GraphMenuHandlers -> handleSave -> writeSolutionTo wiring), and prove the bytes landed by re-binding from disk. Rebinds the global adapter, so it runs in the suite's trailing rebinding block (roundtrip -> staleness -> binary; nothing order-sensitive may follow). Vault lives at <Qualia repo>/debug-logs/parity-vault/ (overwritten per run).

commands: (async () => { const step = (name, e) => { if (!e || e.ok !== true) throw new Error(name + ' failed: ' + JSON.stringify(e)); return e.value; }; const origAlert = window.alert; const origConfirm = window.confirm; window.alert = () => undefined; window.confirm = () => true; try { const ddv = step('loadDDV', window.__canaryLoadDDV({ select: false })); void ddv; await new Promise(r => setTimeout(r, 400)); const solutionText = step('exportGraph', await window.__canaryExportGraph()); const notePath = step('write note.md', await window.__canaryDebugWrite('parity-vault', 'note.md', '# parity note\n')); const vaultDir = notePath.slice(0, notePath.lastIndexOf('/')); step('write .qualia.json', await window.__canaryDebugWrite('parity-vault', '.qualia.json', solutionText)); const bind = step('bindVault', await window.__canaryBindVault(vaultDir)); if (!bind.solution) throw new Error('bindVault picked up no .qualia.json in ' + vaultDir); const adapter = step('fsAdapterInfo', window.__canaryGetFsAdapterInfo()); if (!adapter.workspaceLabel.startsWith('Tauri workspace:')) throw new Error('bound adapter is "' + adapter.workspaceLabel + '" — expected TauriFsAdapter'); if (adapter.capabilities.hash !== true) throw new Error('TauriFsAdapter v2 should report hash:true (got ' + adapter.capabilities.hash + ') — parity row stale? (P2 flip)'); if (adapter.capabilities.watch !== true || adapter.capabilities.nativeWatch !== true) throw new Error('TauriFsAdapter v2 should report watch:true + nativeWatch:true (got watch=' + adapter.capabilities.watch + ' nativeWatch=' + adapter.capabilities.nativeWatch + ')'); step('addNode ptr-host', window.__canaryAddNode({ id: 'canary-parity-ptr-host', label: 'parity pointer host' })); step('addPointer note.md', window.__canaryAddPointer({ nodeId: 'canary-parity-ptr-host', kind: 'file', path: 'note.md' })); const refresh = step('refreshPointers', await window.__canaryRefreshPointers()); if (refresh.missing !== 0 || refresh.conflicting !== 0) throw new Error('refresh on the bound v2 adapter reported missing=' + refresh.missing + ' conflicting=' + refresh.conflicting + ' — a freshly-pointed existing file must resolve live'); step('addNode roundtrip', window.__canaryAddNode({ id: 'canary-roundtrip-node', label: 'roundtrip marker' })); if (window.__canaryIsDirty() !== true) throw new Error('mutation did not mark the solution dirty'); const solBefore = window.__canaryGetCurrentSolution(); if (!solBefore) throw new Error('no currentSolution after bind — Save would open a native Save As dialog'); step('emit menu save', await window.__canaryEmitMenuEvent('save')); await new Promise(r => setTimeout(r, 1500)); if (window.__canaryIsDirty() !== false) throw new Error('menu Save did not clear the dirty flag — bound save failed'); const rebind = step('rebindVault', await window.__canaryBindVault(vaultDir)); if (rebind.solution !== solBefore.path) throw new Error('rebind resolved a different solution: ' + rebind.solution + ' vs ' + solBefore.path); await new Promise(r => setTimeout(r, 400)); const survived = window.__canaryGetNodeSnapshot('canary-roundtrip-node'); if (!survived || survived.ok !== true) throw new Error('roundtrip node absent after rebind-from-disk — save wrote stale/no content'); return 'pass: vault bound (' + adapter.workspaceLabel + '), v2 hash-based refresh clean, menu-save wrote to disk, rebind read the mutation back'; } finally { window.alert = origAlert; window.confirm = origConfirm; } })()
